{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032203582651D04FE27EABDA593B6E"}"},"total":3},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7612203240833155865","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看，很有意思"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772357865,"group_id":"7601559990846901272","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzshcAF+WvpNWwuZZeFVqv+pkN3kfK6Alfiu+YN8QnOk","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1557330191719822","user_name":"爱吃当归鳝鱼汤的虞仕"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1557330191719822","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7601559990846901272","book_info":{"abstract":"穿越洪荒，苍玄穿越成一尊根基不足，所谓残废的十三祖巫，身为穿越者，又无系统也没金手指？深知功德的重要性。
洪荒不是打打杀杀，而是看谁功德多，于是乎，凭借先知，走上了一条赚取功德的道路。
若干年后，诸圣归位，看着巫族之上那无边的功德，都惊了。还有鲲鹏，妖文的创造者也怎么入巫族了。
怎么一个巫族，比圣人的功德都多。
直到若干年后，回首望去，他们才发现，洪荒世界的大功德之人，都出自巫族。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/e07b7a7a2049aa537773a7414fd25cca","author":"元阳道君","author_id":"","book_id":"7601559990846901272","book_name":"洪荒：啥？巫族功德比圣人还多","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#283030","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":93,"name":"扮猪吃虎","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=93&name=扮猪吃虎&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":92,"name":"腹黑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=92&name=腹黑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":66,"name":"洪荒","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=66&name=洪荒&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7601560020299301400","read_count":"10377","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"146194"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"68","tags":"玄幻脑洞,东方玄幻,腹黑,扮猪吃虎,洪荒,穿越","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/1b97ecdf4a72d0a0961f5f0d9cc1047f~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779307106&x-signature=e5YjKSQC7FX9wc20a6yB2rI5rt0%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"103752093495","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"328"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032203582651D04FE27EABDA593B6E"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":1,"forwarded_co
